english: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
text: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.

english: Now the earth was unformed and void, and darkness was upon the face of the deep; and the spirit of God hovered over the face of the waters.
text: Now the earth was unformed and void, and darkness was upon the face of the deep; and the spirit of God hovered over the face of the waters.

english: And God said: 'Let there be light.' And there was light.
text: And God said: 'Let there be light.' And there was light.

english: And God saw the light, that it was good; and God divided the light from the darkness.
text: And God saw the light, that it was good; and God divided the light from the darkness.

english: And God called the light Day, and the darkness He called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
text: And God called the light Day, and the darkness He called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.

english: Now these are the names of the sons of Israel, who came into Egypt with Jacob; every man came with his household:
text: Now these are the names of the sons of Israel, who came into Egypt with Jacob; every man came with his household:
